title: grevillea diffusa subsp. evansiana
intro: Grevillea diffusa subsp. evansiana, also known as the Australian Bastard Box or Native Bastard Box, is a shrub native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Grevillea diffusa subsp. evansiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
